__note: The service loop's claim pool (~44 claims, shuffled each cycle). CLM-1xx entries are DELIBERATELY UNANSWERABLE from the policy corpus — a grounded agent must abstain; an overconfident agent answers anyway and the eval funnel scores it low. claims.example.json stays the small deterministic smoke set for `python agent.py`.
